name: Barov Estate
region: Eastweald, Lordaeron, on the Barov line leading toward Darrowmere Lake and Caer Darrow.

sensoryProfile.sight: Trimmed ditches, worked orchards, pale stone walls, the Barov crest over the gate, busy yards, and a manor too polished for famine country.
sensoryProfile.sound: Stable noise, labor in the yard, measured servant silence, and the quieter hum of wards under everything visible.
sensoryProfile.smell: Cold air, horse sweat, tea, old stone, and money kept warm by enchantment instead of hearthfire.
sensoryProfile.touch: Rutted old-money road, gate iron, mild enchanted interior warmth, and pressure from buried ward-layers under the estate surface.
sensoryProfile.atmosphere: Prosperity used as camouflage. The estate is not ruined or panicked; it is functioning too well.

establishedFacts.fact: The Barov estate is active, staffed, and economically alive despite the plague context around it.
The strongest necromantic pressure does not sit in the manor proper but farther on toward the lake and Caer Darrow.
Alexei Barov expected scrutiny enough to have a polished reception script ready.
Farstrider relays can confirm entry to the estate under mage authority, proving the manor remains a monitored threshold rather than a dead-end suspicion.

eventsHere.event: Jaina arrives openly under Kirin Tor authority and forces the Barov line from paperwork suspicion into face-to-face contact.
Alexei deflects and Jandice takes over, turning a political confrontation into a scholarly guided entry.
Relay traffic confirms Jaina entered the Barov estate under mage authority before crossing onward to Caer Darrow.
